proposals.title: UP_TRI × Bear: n=96, 94.7% WR, Tier M → boost candidate (TAKE_SMALL)

claim.what: Promote boost_pattern: signal=UP_TRI, regime=Bear (Tier B / TAKE_SMALL)
claim.expected_effect: Surface as Tier-B boost on cohort matches; observed +41.1pp edge over per-signal baseline

evidence: Wilson 95% lower bound 0.8815 well above Tier M floor — sample size adequate
R-multiple 0.61 below Tier S threshold (1.0); promotion is to Tier M (B/TAKE_SMALL) only, not Tier S (A/TAKE_FULL)
risks: Cohort tier may drift on next archive comparison; demotion auto-fires per §3
R-multiple distribution under D-8 review (Day-6 forced-exit dominance per project_anchor §7 D-8)

Portfolio is 100% Choppy with UP_TRI dominant (44/46); if regime flips to Bear, the gated cohort would activate atop an already UP_TRI-heavy book — monitor for compounding concentration on regime transition
R-multiple 0.61 reflects D-8 Day-6 forced-exit dominance per project_anchor §7; resolution may shift cohort tier
approval would propagate overlap to mini_scanner_rules.json

proposed_rule_entry.reason: brain_step4: cohort Tier M, n=96, wr=94.7%, edge +41.1pp

decision_metadata.llm_enrichment_rationale: Step 4 tier classification remains robust (n=96, Wilson lower 0.8815, +41.1pp edge over UP_TRI baseline) with promotion correctly capped at Tier M/TAKE_SMALL given R-multiple 0.61. Cohort is regime-gated to Bear while current regime is Choppy (stable, 7 days) with 100% Choppy exposure across 46 open positions, so activation is deferred and existing concentration is not compounded. Consistent with continuous prior approvals of this exact cohort (2026-04-29 through 2026-06-08) and no trader rejection on record.

proposals.title: Exposure concentration: by_regime + by_signal_type×regime×sector + by_signal_type = Choppy regime (100%); UP_TRI×Choppy×Bank cell (30.43%); UP_TRI signal (95.7%) (100.0%)

claim.what: Concentration risk: by_regime + by_signal_type×regime×sector + by_signal_type = Choppy regime (100%); UP_TRI×Choppy×Bank cell (30.43%); UP_TRI signal (95.7%); recommended action: Pause new entries in sector=Bank and broadly in regime=Choppy until Bank cell drops below 20% via natural Day-6 exits; consider hedging long book with index puts or a short-bias proxy to offset Choppy→Bear tail risk on the 44-position UP_TRI long stack.
claim.expected_effect: Trader awareness of tail risk: A Choppy→Bear regime flip would unwind the entire 46-position long-only book simultaneously, with the 14 Bank longs (30% of book) likely correlating sharply to the downside; no validated cohort edge exists to justify holding through the transition.

evidence: Signal mix: UP_TRI 44/46 = 95.7% (above 0.85 threshold), book fully directional long
Matched cohort Choppy×UP_TRI is Candidate tier only (n=188) — unvalidated edge
risks: Recommendation may be over-cautious; concentration may be edge-validated
Trader may already be aware; informational only

proposals.reversibility: Informational warning; no system mutation. Suppresses on next run if concentration drops below threshold.

decision_metadata.concentration_value: Choppy regime (100%); UP_TRI×Choppy×Bank cell (30.43%); UP_TRI signal (95.7%)
decision_metadata.recommended_action: Pause new entries in sector=Bank and broadly in regime=Choppy until Bank cell drops below 20% via natural Day-6 exits; consider hedging long book with index puts or a short-bias proxy to offset Choppy→Bear tail risk on the 44-position UP_TRI long stack.
decision_metadata.tail_risk_scenario: A Choppy→Bear regime flip would unwind the entire 46-position long-only book simultaneously, with the 14 Bank longs (30% of book) likely correlating sharply to the downside; no validated cohort edge exists to justify holding through the transition.
decision_metadata.llm_rationale: Portfolio is 100% Choppy regime (observed 1.0, above 0.80 threshold) AND UP_TRI×Choppy×Bank cell breaches the 0.20 cell threshold at 30.43%. UP_TRI also dominates signal mix at 44/46 = 95.7% (above 0.85 threshold) with the book fully directional long. Matched Choppy×UP_TRI cohort sits only at Candidate tier (n=188) — unvalidated edge across all concentration cells.
